rulings.Case Title: BAY RIDGE PROPERTIES LLC VS. AMERICAN BROKERS CONDUIT CORPORATION et al

Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C and provide courtesy copies of their respective filings to department 501 no later than February 20, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. COSMOS OZONSI et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 10, 2015, line 4. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment is continued to April 3, 2015. 1. Defendant shall have 2 weeks to clean up the premises and bring it two clean and sanitary conditions; 2. Defendant shall post rent and back rent for August 2014 through February 2015 in the amount of $7,077 no later than February 20, 2015. 3. Plaintiff shall conduct an inspection for items listed in Addendum A and other habitability issues during the week of March 2, 2015 pursuant to a 24-hour notice; 4. Plaintiff shall make all the necessary repairs and file supplemental brief/declaration no later than March 27, 2015. = (501/REQ)
